modules.title: Getting Started with SQL and Databases
Working with Text, Lists, Ranges, and NULL
Capstone: Customer Follow-Up Report
modules.description: Pull the course skills together in one final reporting task that feels like a beginner analyst handoff.

topics.title: Module 5 Customer Follow-Up Capstone
topics.summary: Build a real-world customer follow-up report by improving one working query step by step until the final handoff is ready.
learningGoals: Sustain one SQL project through several realistic revisions.
Ship a final customer report that combines the core SQL foundations skills from the course.

projectBrief.scenario: A community outreach coordinator needs a concise customer follow-up list built from the cleanup table. The report must keep only useful, contactable records and rank the most recent signups first.
projectBrief.role: Junior SQL analyst preparing a customer follow-up handoff
projectBrief.workspace: Browser SQL editor, customers table schema, and deterministic results table
projectBrief.deliverable: One four-step cumulative customer follow-up query that combines the core SQL Foundations skills without losing earlier requirements.
requirements: Keep one valid SELECT statement in every step.
Use the previous complete solution as the next starter query.
Preserve every earlier requirement unless the current step explicitly replaces it.
Use only SQL concepts taught in SQL Foundations.
Finish with deterministic ordering and a practical row limit.

stepLadder.title: Build the Follow-Up Candidate List
stepLadder.requirement: Return the requested customer columns and keep only records whose status is active or draft using IN.

stepLadder.title: Keep Contactable Customers
stepLadder.requirement: Preserve the candidate list and require a non-missing email address with IS NOT NULL.

stepLadder.title: Apply the Date and Text Rules
stepLadder.requirement: Keep all prior filters, add the authored signup-date range with BETWEEN, and exclude test-style names with a LIKE-based condition.

stepLadder.title: Rank and Limit the Final Handoff
stepLadder.requirement: Preserve every filter, sort the newest signups first with a stable secondary sort, and limit the report to the requested number of rows.
